cards.prompt: set.Add(5) дважды: печать возвратов и Count?
cards.code: using System.Collections.Generic; var set = new HashSet<int>(); bool a = set.Add(5); bool b = set.Add(5); System.Console.WriteLine($"{a} {b} {set.Count}");

using System.Collections.Generic; var a = new HashSet<int> { 1, 2, 3, 4 }; var b = new HashSet<int> { 3, 4, 5, 6 }; var u = new HashSet<int>(a); u.UnionWith(b); var i = new HashSet<int>(a); i.IntersectWith(b); var e = new HashSet<int>(a); e.ExceptWith(b); System.Console.WriteLine($"union={u.Count} intersect={i.Count} except={e.Count}");

cards.prompt: HashSet из 100000 Probe, ищем присутствующий: Contains + счётчик Equals?
cards.code: using System.Collections.Generic; class Probe { public static int Eq; public readonly int V; public Probe(int v){V=v;} public override bool Equals(object o){Eq++; return o is Probe p && p.V==V;} public override int GetHashCode()=>V.GetHashCode(); } var set = new HashSet<Probe>(); for (int i = 0; i < 100000; i++) set.Add(new Probe(i)); var found = new Probe(50000); set.Add(found); Probe.Eq = 0; bool has = set.Contains(found); int cmp = Probe.Eq; System.Console.WriteLine($"Contains(found)={has}, Equals-вызовов={cmp}");
